rationale: Both evaluations land on the identical score (4/10) and flag the same core themes: extensive technical/open-source strength, limited explicit team-management experience, and 'Basic' German falling short of the C1 requirement. None of the variant's concerns key off the candidate now being in Bucharest rather than Berlin — the German-language concern was already present in the baseline and is tied to the role being in Germany, not to the candidate's location. The remaining differences (reordering of concerns, added phrasing like 'client advising and domestic travel') are rewording and run-to-run variation rather than penalties attached to the demographic signal.
